difficulty.reason: Broadcast sow, cut-and-come-again, fast visible results

growth_stages.name: Germination
growth_stages.look_for: Tiny green sprouts across the soil like a green carpet forming

prompt.en: Look! The soil is turning green -- those are baby lettuce plants!
prompt.da: Se! Jorden bliver groen -- det er baby salatplanter!

growth_stages.name: Growth
growth_stages.look_for: Leaves getting taller, different shapes and colors in the mix

prompt.en: How many different leaf shapes can you see? Some are smooth, some are frilly!
prompt.da: Hvor mange forskellige bladformer kan du se? Nogle er glatte, nogle er krusede!

growth_stages.name: First Harvest
growth_stages.look_for: Leaves about 10cm tall, ready to cut

prompt.en: Use the scissors to cut leaves 2cm above the soil -- they'll grow back!
prompt.da: Brug saksen til at klippe blade 2cm over jorden -- de vokser ud igen!

human_readable.en: Keep moist. Water lightly every day in warm weather. Drying out causes bolting.
human_readable.da: Hold fugtig. Vand let hver dag i varmt vejr. Udtoerring faar den til at skyde.

harvest.notes: Cut-and-come-again: cut 2cm above soil, regrows 2-3 times. Bolts in summer heat (June+).

companion_plants.notes: Spring onion scent deters lettuce pests. Radish marks rows.

message.en: Lettuce needs water urgently -- it will bolt if it dries out!
message.da: Salat har akut brug for vand -- den skyder, hvis den toerrer ud!
